name: Vizi FX7
comment: Vizi FX7 : Offering four unique effects in one powerful fixture, a beam, a wash, a multi-colored kaleidoscope, and a LED ring effect, the Vizi FX7 is a professional moving head luminaire ideal for event production and venue integration. With individual pixel control over the primary LEDs and a variety of built-in FX programs, the Vizi FX7’s four distinct functions can be used individually or combined to create a huge variety of aerial effects.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
Strobe Effect Slow to Fast  Kaleidoscope

Strobe Effect Slow to Fast  Ring
